slots.root: fixed inset-0 z-palette flex items-start justify-center pt-[12vh] bg-scrim backdrop-blur-scrim
slots.panel: w-140 max-w-[92vw] bg-base-200 border-[length:var(--bw)] border-neutral rounded-lg shadow-3 overflow-hidden
slots.search: flex items-center gap-2.5 px-4 py-3.5 border-b-[length:var(--bw)] border-base-300
slots.input: flex-1 bg-transparent border-none outline-none text-base-content font-body text-ctl
slots.esc: font-mono text-ctl-xs text-base-content/62 border-[length:var(--bw)] border-base-300 rounded-xs px-1.5 py-0.5
slots.row: flex items-center gap-3 w-full text-left px-3 py-2.5 rounded-sm border-none cursor-pointer bg-transparent text-base-content/82
